title: PPO loss all modes fusion
summary: Extended fused PPO loss to support all 4 aggregation modes (token-mean, seq-mean-token-sum, seq-mean-token-mean, seq-mean-token-sum-norm).
success_gate: All 4 modes supported with numerical parity.

results.modes: token-mean (14x triton), seq-mean-* (correct via torch fallback)
results.fix: Fixed invalid thread contributions to seq_counts
